title: AN ACT CREATING BARRIO SAMPAGUITA IN LIPA CITY

chunks.text:
H. No. 17266 / 65 OG No. 51, 14114 (December 22, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5686, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO SAMPAGUITA IN LIPA CITY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Sarapalocan in Barrio Cumba, Lipa City, is hereby separated from said barrio, and converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said city, to be known as Barrio Sampaguita.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
